title: Best surface cleaners & disinfectants | Bin Diving
description: AI-dug recommendations for best surface cleaners & disinfectants. Compare options and find one that fits.

pros: Fast kill claims vs common germs
cons: Not for porous or colored surfaces
May be harsh on some finishes

recommendations.product_name: Lysol Disinfectant Spray / Lysol All-Purpose Cleaner
pros: Kills 99.9% of viruses & bacteria per label
cons: Aerosol format may not suit all surfaces
Some product variants have had availability/recall issues in past years

recommendations.product_name: Seventh Generation Disinfecting Multi-Surface Cleaner (Lemongrass Citrus)
pros: No-rinse claim safe for some food-contact surfaces
cons: Slower contact time vs some chemical disinfectants
Less aggressive on heavy bleach-requiring stains

https://www.refinery29.com/en-us/shop/pr.title: Clorox + Clean-Up All Purpose Cleaner, 32 Fl Oz
https://www.refinery29.com/en-us/shop/pr.description:
Clean-Up All Purpose Cleaner, 32 Fl Oz + One 32 ounce spray bottle of Clorox clean-up all purpose cleaner with bleach, fresh scent
All purpose cleaner powered by bleach removes tough stains on contact
Kills 99.9% of common household germs
Quickly and effectively disinfects and deodorizes with a fresh scent
Can be used on multiple surfaces indoors and outdoors
Clorox Clean-Up all purpose bleach spray cleaner is designed to quickly and effectively clean, disinfect and deodorize a variety of surfaces both indoors and outdoors, while leaving behind a pleasant fresh scent. It removes tough kitchen and bath stains, grease and dirt on contact, while killing over 99% of germs. This household cleaner can be used on multiple hard, nonporous surfaces throughout your home, including kitchen sinks, counters, refrigerators, appliances, tubs, toilets, fiberglass, floors, showers and tiles. With the Smart Tube technology bottle, you are guaranteed to spray every last drop. The easy to use trigger lets you spray into corners and hard to reach places. This cleaner leaves your home sparkling clean and smelling fresh. Clorox Clean Up Cleaner with Bleach gets the job done.
